utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh that is five Ross . Five women have had five babies ! And I have had no babies ! Why does not she want to come out ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_Five women have had five babies ! And I have had no babies ! Why does not she want to come out ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know what I think it is ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I think you have made such a nice home for her over the last nine months that she just does not want to leave .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh . Look at you making up crap for me . Oh God !

emotion_cause.span: 4_Look at you making up crap for me .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: Twenty ... one hours , you are a hero .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Doctor you gotta do something ! I think you gotta give me drugs or you gotta light a fire up in there and just smoke it out .

emotion_cause.span: 1_Five women have had five babies ! And I have had no babies ! Why does not she want to come out ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: Actually , I think you are ready to go to the delivery room .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I think you are ready to go to the delivery room .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Long
utterances.text: Ten centimeters , you are about to become a mom .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: My God . Okay . Ha ... ha ... ha beat you ! Sucker !

emotion_cause.span: 9_you are about to become a mom .
